title: Immunofluorescence and Confocal Imaging in Brain Sections and Image Analysis
author: Chuyu Chen

steps.title: Incubate brain sections in 5% goat serum with 0
steps.instruction: Incubate brain sections in 5% goat serum with 0.2% Triton X-100 for 2 hours RT.

steps.title: Antigen retrieval
steps.instruction: Antigen retrieval: incubate the sections in antigen unmasking solution (Vector, H-3300, 48ul in 5ml water) at 100°C for 30 minutes

steps.title: cooling the sections to room temperature, 30 minutes RT
steps.instruction: cooling the sections to room temperature, 30 minutes RT

steps.title: wash with PBS x 3, 5 mins, RT
steps.instruction: wash with PBS x 3, 5 mins, RT

steps.title: Incubate section overnight at 4°C in...
steps.instruction: Incubate section overnight at 4°C in 5% goat serum with 0.2% Triton X-100

steps.title: incubate with primary antibodies in 5% goat serum with 0
steps.instruction: incubate with primary antibodies in 5% goat serum with 0.2% Triton X-100, 48-72 hrs at at 4°C

steps.title: washing with PBS x3, 5 mins, RT
steps.instruction: washing with PBS x3, 5 mins, RT

steps.title: incubated with secondary antibodies—Alexa Fluor‱ 488,...
steps.instruction: incubated with secondary antibodies—Alexa Fluor‱ 488, Alexa Fluor‱ 568, and Alexa Fluor‱ 647 (1:300, invitrogen) in 5% goat serum with 0.2% Triton X-100, 3hrs, RT

steps.title: wash with PBS 5 mins x3, RT
steps.instruction: wash with PBS 5 mins x3, RT

steps.title: Lrrk2 signal in SNc sections
steps.instruction: Lrrk2 signal in SNc sections: anti-Th (1:1000, SYSY), anti-Aldh1a1 (1:300, Abcam), anti-LRRK2/Dardarin clone N241A/34 (1:200, NeuroMab), anti-GFP (1:1000, invitrogen).

steps.title: Lrrk2 signal in SNc sections
steps.instruction: Lrrk2 signal in SNc sections

steps.title: The surface rendering function are used to segment Th/Aldh1a1 cells
steps.instruction: The surface rendering function are used to segment Th/Aldh1a1 cells

steps.title: Mean intensity of Aldh1a1 protein within...
steps.instruction: Mean intensity of Aldh1a1 protein within the Th surface above 1.5 times the average Th protein channel mean intensity is set to be considered positive

steps.title: The Lrrk2 intensity within Th-positive cells...
steps.instruction: The Lrrk2 intensity within Th-positive cells is measured automatically by the software

steps.title: Striatal Th expressing fibers analysis:
steps.instruction: Striatal Th expressing fibers analysis:

steps.title: Volume measurements of Th fibers Surface...
steps.instruction: Volume measurements of Th fibers Surface rendering function is used to segment the Th fiber.

steps.title: Striatal Th expressing fibers
steps.instruction: Striatal Th expressing fibers : : anti-Th (1:1000, SYSY), anti-Aldh1a1 (1:300, Abcam), and anti-Vmat2 (1:200, Immunostar).

steps.title: filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50
steps.instruction: filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50. Th volume are measured automatically by software.

steps.title: Intensity and area of Th expressing axons
steps.instruction: Intensity and area of Th expressing axons. Performe rolling ball background subtraction with Nikon Elements software.

steps.title: For the high magnification analysis Use...
steps.instruction: For the high magnification analysis Use surface rendering function segment TH, Aldh1a1, and Vmat2 proteins.

steps.title: Filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50
steps.instruction: Filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50.

steps.title: Apply “overlapped area ratio to surface surface=TH-aldh1a1” above 0
steps.instruction: Apply “overlapped area ratio to surface surface=TH-aldh1a1” above 0.4 for the Aldh1a1 positive Th axon,

steps.title: Filter Vmat2 within Th axonal terminal...
steps.instruction: Filter Vmat2 within Th axonal terminal with “overlapped area ratio to surface surface= Th-VMAT2” above 0.4.

steps.title: Area and intensity are measured automatically by software
steps.instruction: Area and intensity are measured automatically by software.

steps.title: For the low magnification analysis Use...
steps.instruction: For the low magnification analysis Use the surface rendering function segment TH.

steps.title: Filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50
steps.instruction: Filter segments with “Number of voxels Img=1” set above 50. Th area and intensity are measured automatically by software.

steps.title: Change buffer with 30% sucrose in PBS, 48 hours
steps.instruction: Change buffer with 30% sucrose in PBS, 48 hours

steps.title: Cryosection (30 μm thickness)
steps.instruction: Cryosection (30 μm thickness). The slices were collected in PBS containing 0.1% sodium azide and stored at 4°C for immunohistochemistry.

steps.title: post-fix with 4% paraformaldehyde in PBS, overnight at 4°C
steps.instruction: post-fix with 4% paraformaldehyde in PBS, overnight at 4°C

steps.title: Confocal images are obtained with Nikon...
steps.instruction: Confocal images are obtained with Nikon CSU-W1 SoRa with a 60x objective at 0.1 mm intervals at 1,024 x 1,024 pixel resolution for volume measurements of Th fibers

steps.title: 100x objective for Th
steps.instruction: 100x objective for Th

steps.title: 20x objective for Lrrk2 expression, Th...
steps.instruction: 20x objective for Lrrk2 expression, Th area, intensity and APEX2 expression,

steps.title: Confocal images are obtained using the...
steps.instruction: Confocal images are obtained using the Nikon A1R microscope at a resolution of 1,024 x 1,024 pixels, maintaining constant laser power for each channel across genotypes.

steps.title: mount the sections using ProLong‱ Diamond Antifade Mountant (invitrogen)
steps.instruction: mount the sections using ProLong‱ Diamond Antifade Mountant (invitrogen)

steps.title: Perfuse mice (5ml/min) with 50 ml...
steps.instruction: Perfuse mice (5ml/min) with 50 ml of PBS, followed by 50 ml of 4% paraformaldehyde in PBS.

description: Enable background subtraction; the diameter for the largest sphere is set to 10 μm and automatically thresholded, with a smoothing surface set to 3 μm Enable background subtraction; the diameter of the largest sphere is set at 0.805 μm and the threshold set at 2000. Disable background subtraction; automated thresholds are applied with manual adjustments made as needed. Disable background subtraction; automated thresholds are applied with manual adjustments made as needed.
